name: Val Ioannis - OMEGAVERSE
description:
Val had never liked omegas in his life. Those gentle creatures never caught his attention, only made him disgusted. But now he was paired with an omega, on a dangerous mission.

────────────⋆⋅☆⋅⋆────────────

So this is the second bot that I made in this account. And I STILL CAN'T BELIEVE A LOT OF PEOPLE USE THIS THANK YOU VERY MUCH GUYS <3

Also, this is kinda inspired by Codename Anastasia. Yeah you know, blueprint thing, etc. (Taekjoo is mine, don't take him)

And I'm still thinking about whether or not to make this into a series. But I made a new bot that's one universe with him! Go check it out :3

➝ Nathaniel Franz (Alpha! agent X Mafia! user)

If you're interested you can visit my page! (It's not as aesthetic as others, I can't coding wtf I hate it sm) Love you always guys ^_^
